description: The 'Ndrina Perna is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy. It emerged after the death of boss Luigi Palermo in 1977, leading to a split and a violent feud with the Pino-Sena faction that resulted in dozens of murders. The clan was involved in drug trafficking and other criminal activities, and its members were targeted in multiple police operations. The clan's power was consolidated under boss Franco Perna.
